name: Heavy Vehicle Excise Tax Exemptions

eligibility.description: The vehicle must be designed for a specific exempt purpose (e.g., spreading fertilizer, mobile drilling, or idling reduction) as defined in the section.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Complete exemption from the 12% retail tax for specific vehicle types including mobile machinery, ambulances, hearses, concrete mixers, and farm equipment.
